topStories.description: Government reaches out again, this time in writing, after Congress spurns its informal feelers to discuss the implementation timeline for the Women’s Reservation Act

topStories.title: Could the Iran war trigger a global recession?
topStories.description: Energy prices are surging as the Iran war disrupts supply, raising risks for the US, China and Europe.

topStories.title: Mojtaba Khamenei's ‘god’s will' escape during US-Israel strike that killed his father: What does leaked audio reveal?
topStories.description: Leaked audio reportedly reveals that Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran's new supreme leader, narrowly escaped a US-Israeli missile strike on February 28 by stepping outside moments before the attack, while his wife and son tragically died in the explosion.

topStories.title: Gecko Robotics lands the largest U.S. Navy robotics deal yet
topStories.description: Gecko Robotics inked a five-year deal to help the U.S. Navy monitor and predict needed maintenance on its fleet of ships.

dailyNews.description: Two Iranian women's soccer players granted asylum in Australia were seen practicing with the Brisbane Roar of the country's A-League on Monday.

dailyNews.title: Top Iranian officials targeted and killed in military strikes and more top headlines
dailyNews.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.

dailyNews.title: I run a fracking company — New York banned the industry and stuck the poor with the bill
dailyNews.description: New York's fracking ban creates energy poverty for 2.7 million residents while Pennsylvania neighbors profit from natural gas drilling.

dailyNews.title: Bill Maher makes fun of guest for attending Kamala Harris rally, donating to her campaign
dailyNews.description: Jerry O'Connell defended attending a Kamala Harris rally with Megan Thee Stallion performance while Bill Maher criticizes celebrity involvement in Democratic politics on podcast.

dailyNews.title: Bone broth cocktails pop up on bar menus amid today's protein craze
dailyNews.description: From Detroit's Bullshot to modern creations, bartenders are embracing bone broth in cocktails. Here's how this savory trend is reshaping drink menus.

dailyNews.title: Trump teases Venezuela as 51st state after team advances to World Baseball Classic final
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump weighed in on Truth Social after Venzuela came back to defeat Italy in the World Baseball Classic semifinal on Monday night.

dailyNews.title: Guaranteed income program made Texas mom realize low-income, marginalized groups were underserved for so long
dailyNews.description: Taniquewa Brewster benefited from Austin's guaranteed income pilot program, which was a initiative using tax dollars for unconditional cash assistance.

dailyNews.title: Two-time NCAA champion Jalen Brunson reveals what it takes to be great in March Madness
dailyNews.description: Jalen Brunson shared valuable championship advice for March Madness hopefuls, drawing from his two NCAA titles with Villanova and current NBA experience.

dailyNews.title: Specific amount of nightly sleep may lower diabetes risk, researchers find
dailyNews.description: A large observational study suggests that around seven hours of nightly sleep is associated with lower insulin resistance, while too little or too much sleep may worsen metabolic health.

dailyNews.title: Mark Normand says late night is 'dying' — how the stand-up comic keeps up in a changing comedy scene
dailyNews.description: Comedian Mark Normand explained how social media-fueled partisanship prevents audiences from enjoying comedy as people focus on determining political stances instead.

dailyNews.description: Plus, the champion of “Swedish death cleaning” dies at 91.

dailyNews.title: War Isn’t the Only Thing on Trump’s Mind
dailyNews.description: President Trump spoke to journalists for about 40 minutes before holding a news conference on Monday, offering a glimpse into his priorities.

dailyNews.title: Richard Grenell: From Trump Cabinet Hopeful to Ex-Kennedy Center Manager
dailyNews.description: Richard Grenell once hoped to be President Trump’s secretary of state. Instead, Mr. Trump just replaced him as Kennedy Center president.

dailyNews.title: Oil Begins Flowing Through California Pipeline Under Trump Order
dailyNews.description: Oil had not flowed through the pipeline since a 2015 rupture caused an environmental disaster on California’s Central Coast. It sets up a new fight between the Trump administration and state officials.

dailyNews.title: Trump Officials Weigh New Plan to Stop Offshore Wind Farms
dailyNews.description: Proposed settlements would block wind farms off New York State and North Carolina, according to documents reviewed by The New York Times.

dailyNews.title: Cuba Ready to Accept Outside Investment, Top Official Says
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s words came amid a nationwide blackout and as a top Cuban official said his country would move to open the economy to foreign investors.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Seeks to Remove Cuba’s President From Power During Negotiations
dailyNews.description: The United States has told Cuba that for meaningful progress to be made in negotiations, President Miguel Díaz-Canel must step down, said people familiar with the talks.

dailyNews.title: Senate to Take Up Voter Bill Sought by Trump but Opposed by Democrats
dailyNews.description: The Republican leader said he couldn’t overcome a filibuster but, under relentless pressure from the president and the far right, would put Democrats on the record against the restrictive voter I.D. bill.

dailyNews.title: Israel targets more Iran leaders as allies reject Trump's calls for help
dailyNews.description: Israel says it killed Iran's top security official Ali Larijani, as America's European allies reject Trump's demands for help in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump planning big White House event around EPA's biofuels mandates decision
dailyNews.description: President Trump has invited farmers and biofuels producers to the White House for an event next week as the industry awaits the government's announcement on mandates for the fuel additives.

dailyNews.title: Iran war keeps Strait of Hormuz paralyzed and gas prices on the rise
dailyNews.description: The Iran war could escalate further as President Trump threatens to hit key oil infrastructure if Tehran doesn't drop its chokehold on the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: 3/9: Face the Nation
dailyNews.description: This week on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," after a whiplash week of on-again, off-again tariff announcements, Canadian ambassador to the U.S. Kirsten Hillman joins to discuss the costs and consequences of a trade war. Plus, former White House Russia expert Fiona Hill discusses President Trump's diplomatic pivot on Ukraine.
